column1: Customer Visit/VOC,Plan,"[Site]: <Customer[/OEM]> plans to visit <Site> on <Date> for <Purpose>."
Customer Request,Plan,"[Site]: <Customer> <UrgentVerb> <Site> to <Action> <Tier1/OEM> <Product> <Task> on <Date>; CQE <Role>, plan to <NextStep> on <NextDate>."
Complaints,IQC/VLRR/0KM/FR,"[Site] [Category]: <Customer> reported (<Project>) <Product> <Defect> *<Qty> pcs in <Location> on <Date>; <Follow-up actions>."
New Project Kick-off,NA,"[Site]: <Customer>/<Product> (<ProjectName>) kicked off on <Date>; <Status>."

Rule,Notes,"Complaint quantity format must be '*<Qty> pcs'; project name is the Chinese location in parentheses; avoid 'keep tracking'; if missing data, mark '⚠ Missing:'; location precedes date when both exist."
